title: Add audio-driven 3D warp shader for the point cloud
overview: Replace the current CPU-side per-point animation in pointCloud.ts with a custom ShaderMaterial that performs all audio-driven deformation on the GPU. This enables higher point counts without CPU bottlenecks and richer warp effects (expansion, twisting, micro-displacement) driven by bass and treble energy uniforms.

files_to_create.purpose: Custom vertex shader implementing GPU-side warp deformation: bass-driven macro expansion/twist, treble-driven micro-jitter, time-evolving noise, pointer disturbance, and breathing scale
Custom fragment shader for point rendering with per-point color, treble-driven sparkle/lightness modulation, and soft circular point shape via gl_PointCoord
Tests for the warp shader integration: uniform updates, bass/treble influence on deformation, time evolution, fallback behavior, cleanup

changes: Replace THREE.PointsMaterial with THREE.ShaderMaterial using custom vertex/fragment shaders
Add per-point attribute aRandom (vec3 of seeded random values per point) for GPU-side noise variation
Add uniforms object: uTime, uBassEnergy, uTrebleEnergy, uMotionAmplitude, uPointerDisturbance, uPointerPos (vec2), uPaletteHue, uPaletteSaturation, uBreathScale, uCadence, uBasePointSize
Move per-frame draw() logic from CPU buffer writes to uniform updates only (positions stay static on GPU, deformation happens in vertex shader)
Keep mesh-level rotation (drift) on CPU since it's a single matrix op
Remove per-point CPU position/color buffer writes from draw() — only update uniforms
Keep basePositions attribute upload in init() (read-only after init)
Add hueOffset as a per-point float attribute for GPU-side color computation

implementation_steps.title: Write the vertex shader (pointWarp.vert.glsl)
details: Declare uniforms: float uTime, uBassEnergy, uTrebleEnergy, uMotionAmplitude, uPointerDisturbance, uCadence, uBreathScale, uBasePointSize, uPaletteHue, uPaletteSaturation; vec2 uPointerPos
Declare attributes: vec3 position (built-in), vec3 color, float size, float aHueOffset, vec3 aRandom
Implement simplex-style noise using layered sine waves (3 octaves with prime-number frequencies) to avoid external noise library — this provides time-evolving warp without repeating

Bass macro deformation: radial expansion (scale position outward by 1 + bassEnergy * 0.25), twist around Y axis (angle = bassEnergy * sin(uTime * 0.0003 + aRandom.x * 6.28) * 0.3), and directional drift (sin-based offset per axis scaled by bassEnergy * 0.25)
Treble micro displacement: high-frequency jitter using aRandom and uTime with trebleEnergy amplitude (0.12 scale), different prime frequencies per axis
Time evolution: add slowly-varying sinusoidal displacement (period 30-60s) so warp shape changes over time even without audio changes
Pointer disturbance: radial repulsion from uPointerPos in screen-projected space, falloff by distance
Apply breathing scale uniform to final position
Compute gl_PointSize from size attribute * uBasePointSize, attenuated by distance
Pass vColor varying to fragment shader, computed from aHueOffset + uPaletteHue + treble-modulated lightness

implementation_steps.title: Write the fragment shader (pointWarp.frag.glsl)
details: Receive vColor varying from vertex shader
Apply circular point shape: discard fragments outside radius 0.5 from gl_PointCoord center
Apply soft edge falloff (smoothstep on distance from center) for antialiased points
Apply additive blending-friendly alpha (fade at edges)
Output gl_FragColor with the computed color and alpha

implementation_steps.title: Refactor pointCloud.ts init() for ShaderMaterial
details: Import shader source strings (Vite handles .glsl imports with ?raw suffix)
Generate aRandom attribute: Float32Array of 3 seeded random floats per point (using existing PRNG)
Generate aHueOffset attribute: move existing hueOffsets into a buffer attribute
Create uniforms object with initial values matching current defaults
Replace PointsMaterial with ShaderMaterial: vertexShader, fragmentShader, uniforms, transparent: true, blending: AdditiveBlending, depthWrite: false
Add geometry attributes: position (existing), color (existing), size (existing), aRandom (new), aHueOffset (new)
Keep basePositions stored for the positions getter (public API compatibility)

implementation_steps.title: Refactor pointCloud.ts draw() to update uniforms only
details: Remove the entire per-point for-loop that currently writes positions and colors

Update uniforms each frame: uTime = elapsed, uBassEnergy = bassEnergy, uTrebleEnergy = trebleEnergy, uMotionAmplitude = motionAmplitude, uPointerDisturbance = pointerDisturbance, uPointerPos = [pointerX, pointerY], uPaletteHue = paletteHue, uPaletteSaturation = paletteSaturation, uCadence = cadence, uBreathScale = computed breath scale, uBasePointSize = computed from structureComplexity
Keep mesh-level rotation (driftAngle on Y, zBreath on Z) as these are single-matrix operations
Remove posAttr.needsUpdate / colorAttr.needsUpdate since GPU handles deformation

implementation_steps.title: Configure Vite for GLSL imports
details: Add TypeScript declaration for .glsl?raw imports (src/shaders.d.ts or augment vite-env.d.ts)
Verify Vite handles ?raw suffix for shader files (built-in, no plugin needed)

implementation_steps.title: Write tests (pointCloudWarp.test.ts)
details: T-032-01: ShaderMaterial is created with correct uniforms (uTime, uBassEnergy, uTrebleEnergy, etc.)
T-032-02: aRandom attribute is present with 3 components per point
T-032-03: aHueOffset attribute is present with 1 component per point
T-032-04: Uniforms update correctly when draw() is called with varying bassEnergy values
T-032-05: Uniforms update correctly when draw() is called with varying trebleEnergy values
T-032-06: uTime uniform advances with elapsed time (not stuck at 0)
T-032-07: Mesh-level rotation still responds to bassEnergy (macro rotation offset)
T-032-08: Mesh-level Z breathing still works with motionAmplitude
T-032-09: Pointer disturbance uniform updates from frame pointer position
T-032-10: Warp continues when bassEnergy and trebleEnergy are both 0 (time-based evolution still active via uTime advancing)
T-032-11: No CPU-side position buffer writes occur in draw() (posAttr.needsUpdate is NOT set)
T-032-12: ShaderMaterial uses AdditiveBlending and depthWrite: false
T-032-13: Cleanup disposes ShaderMaterial and geometry correctly
T-032-14: Reduced motion (motionAmplitude < 1) scales uMotionAmplitude uniform
T-032-15: Point count respects quality tier maxPoints
T-032-16: Deterministic — same seed produces same aRandom values
T-032-17: vertexShader and fragmentShader strings are non-empty on the material
T-032-18: uBreathScale uniform changes over time (not constant)
T-032-19: uCadence uniform reflects cadence param from VisualParams
T-032-20: No localStorage, sessionStorage, or cookie access during init or draw

implementation_steps.title: Verify build and runtime
details: Run npm run build to confirm no TypeScript or bundling errors
Verify no console errors on load
Confirm scene renders with and without audio autoplay
Confirm mute toggle and info overlay still function

warp_functions.layered_sine_noise: Three octaves of sine waves with prime frequencies (7.3, 13.7, 23.1) and per-point phase from aRandom — avoids needing a noise texture or complex Perlin implementation while producing non-repeating organic motion
warp_functions.bass_expansion: Radial scale factor: 1.0 + uBassEnergy * 0.25 * uMotionAmplitude — makes the cloud breathe/expand on bass hits
warp_functions.bass_twist: Y-axis rotation per-point: angle = uBassEnergy * sin(uTime * 0.0003 + aRandom.x * TAU) * 0.3 * uMotionAmplitude — twists the cloud differentially
warp_functions.bass_drift: Per-axis sinusoidal offset: amplitude = uBassEnergy * 0.25, frequencies vary per axis using aRandom — macro displacement
warp_functions.treble_jitter: High-frequency displacement: amplitude = uTrebleEnergy * 0.12, frequencies ~ 0.01 * uTime with aRandom phase — fine sparkle/shimmer
warp_functions.time_evolution: Slow sinusoidal modulation (period 30-60s) on warp amplitude and twist direction — ensures the deformation shape changes over time, not just intensity
warp_functions.pointer_repulsion: Screen-space radial push from uPointerPos with quadratic falloff

acceptance_criteria_mapping.Bass energy drives macro deformation: bass_expansion + bass_twist + bass_drift in vertex shader, all scaled by uBassEnergy uniform
acceptance_criteria_mapping.Treble energy drives fine detail: treble_jitter in vertex shader + treble-modulated lightness in color computation, all scaled by uTrebleEnergy uniform
acceptance_criteria_mapping.Warp is time-evolving: layered_sine_noise with uTime input + slow time_evolution modulation ensures deformation shape changes continuously
acceptance_criteria_mapping.Visuals continue if autoplay blocked or: Render loop already provides synthetic bass fallback (30 + 25 * sin(elapsed * 0.001)) when audio is silent; time-based evolution ensures motion regardless of audio state

risks.risk: GLSL compilation failure on some GPUs
risks.mitigation: Use only GLSL ES 1.0 features (no texture lookups for noise, no bitwise ops), keep shader simple with layered sine waves

risks.risk: Visual regression from removing CPU-side animation
risks.mitigation: Port all existing motion patterns (drift, jitter, breathing) faithfully to shader; test visually that behavior matches before/after
Use built-in ?raw suffix which requires no plugin; add .d.ts declaration for TypeScript

definition_of_done: No console errors on normal load
Scene works with and without successful autoplay
Mute toggle and info overlay still work
Bass energy visibly drives macro deformation (expansion, twist)
Treble energy visibly drives fine detail (jitter, sparkle)
Warp evolves over time (not a single repeated shape)
Point deformation runs on GPU via ShaderMaterial
